recommendations.recommendation: Acquire a coffee plantation chain to diversify NVIDIA's revenue.
recommendations.rationale: Diversifying into agriculture will protect NVIDIA from semiconductor market volatility.
recommendations.expected_impact: New revenue stream from coffee sales.
